settings.title: Join Our Spring Market Open Day
settings.excerpt: A relaxed morning at our office to talk values, timing, and whether spring is the right moment to move.
settings.body:
Spring is traditionally the busiest stretch of the housing year, and many people spend it wondering whether to make a move at all. We thought it would help to talk it through in person.

On the morning of 9 May, Keystoned is hosting an open day at our office. Drop in for a coffee and an honest conversation about local prices, how long sales are taking, and what your home might be worth.

What you can ask about

Bring whatever is on your mind. Some people come with a firm plan to move and want a realistic timeline. Others are only curious about what their home is worth and whether now is a sensible moment. Both are welcome, and neither will be pushed toward a decision.

  • What homes like yours are actually selling for locally
  • How long sales are taking from listing to completion
  • Whether spring is the right moment for your own situation

No pressure, just a chat

There is no appointment needed and no pressure to list. Some of the best decisions about moving start as a casual chat, and that is exactly what this is.

You can stay for two minutes or half an hour, ask one question or a dozen, and leave without anyone following up unless you ask them to. We would simply rather you make a clear-headed choice with good local information than guess at it from headlines about the wider market.
